description: AcaClaw curated skills manifest. Skills are installed from ClawHub or use OpenClaw bundled skills. Developed and published from github.com/acaclaw/acaclaw-skills. Each discipline has a self-contained Conda environment (e.g. acaclaw-bio) that includes all base packages (Python + R) plus discipline-specific ones. The active environment is auto-detected and injected into LLM context.

environment.notes: Each discipline env is self-contained — includes all base packages (Python: numpy, scipy, pandas, matplotlib; R: tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr; JupyterLab with IRkernel) plus discipline-specific packages. No overlay/update needed.

skills.notes: Additional skills can be installed from the browser UI or via: clawhub install <skill-name>
